title: Labeled microtubules for single-molecule imaging

steps: In a prechilled 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube, make a 10 µL mixture of 10 mg/mL, tubulin . The mixture should be 80% unlabeled, 10% biotin-tubulin, and 10% 405-tubulin. Mix by gently flicking.
Let it sit On ice for 00:10:00 .
Add equal volume of 2 x, polymerization buffer ( 10 µL ). Mix by gently flicking.
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 . Make a 1 x, BRB80 + 1 millimolar (mM), DTT + 20 micromolar (µM), Taxol stock and incubate at 37 °C at the same time.
Add equal volume of prewarmed 1 x, BRB80 + DTT + Taxol ( 20 µL ). Mix by gently flicking.
Incubate at 37 °C for at least 00:10:00 (solution will be stable for hours at this point).
Store in the dark at Room temperature . Should be usable for several weeks, but more aggregates will appear over time.
creator: Mariusz Matyszewski
